modules.module_title: Plumbing Codes, Customer Service & Advanced Concepts

questions.question: Plumbing work karte samay sabse pehle kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Safety

questions.explanation: Plumbing work mein safety sabse important hai taaki accidents se bacha jaa sake.

questions.question: Pipe cutting ke liye common tool kaun sa hai?

options.B: Screwdriver

questions.explanation: Pipe cutter specially pipes ko clean aur straight kaatne ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Wrenches ka use kya hai plumbing mein?

options.B: Nuts aur bolts ko tight ya loose karna

questions.explanation: Wrenches, jaise pipe wrench aur adjustable wrench, fittings aur pipes ke nuts ko tight ya loose karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: PPE ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Professional Plumbing Essentials

questions.explanation: PPE ka matlab 'Personal Protective Equipment' hai, jo worker ki safety ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Electric shock ke khatre se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Geeli jagah par khade hokar kaam karna
options.B: Insulated tools ka use karna

questions.explanation: Insulated tools ka use karne se electric shock ka khatra kam ho jaata hai, especially jab electrical components ke paas kaam kar rahe ho.

questions.question: Hacksaw ka use kya hai plumbing mein?

options.B: Metal pipes ko kaatna

questions.explanation: Hacksaw ka use metal pipes, jaise GI pipes, ko kaatne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko chemical burn ho jaaye, toh sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Turant paani se dhoona

questions.explanation: Chemical burn hone par, turant affected area ko running water se dhoona chahiye, taaki chemical ka effect kam ho sake.

questions.question: Measuring tape ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.A: Pipes ka weight napne ke liye
options.B: Distances aur lengths measure karne ke liye
options.C: Paani ka pressure napne ke liye

questions.explanation: Measuring tape plumbing mein accurate measurements lene ke liye essential hai, jaise pipe ki length.

questions.question: Gloves pehenna kyun zaroori hai plumbing work mein?

options.B: Haathon ko cuts, chemicals aur dirt se bachane ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Gloves haathon ko sharp objects, corrosive chemicals aur general dirt se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Agar kaam karte samay koi tool gir jaaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant utha kar side mein rakhna chahiye
options.C: Kisi aur ko uthane ke liye bolna chahiye
options.D: Us par paani daal dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Gire hue tools ko turant utha kar sahi jagah par rakhna chahiye taaki trip hazard na bane.

questions.question: Adjustable wrench aur pipe wrench mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Pipe wrench sirf plastic pipes ke liye hai
options.B: Adjustable wrench sirf nuts ke liye hai, pipe wrench pipes ko grip karta hai
options.D: Adjustable wrench bade kaam ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Adjustable wrench nuts aur bolts ko tight/loose karta hai, jabki pipe wrench pipes aur round fittings ko strong grip karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Safety goggles kyun pehente hain?

options.B: Aankhon ko dust, debris aur chemical splashes se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety goggles aankhon ko flying particles, dust aur harmful chemicals se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Scaffolding ka use kab karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab height par kaam karna ho

questions.explanation: Scaffolding ek safe aur stable platform provide karta hai high places par kaam karne ke liye, ladders se zyada safe.

questions.question: Drill machine ka primary use kya hai plumbing mein?

options.B: Walls aur surfaces mein holes banana

questions.explanation: Drill machine ka use holes banane ke liye hota hai, jaise pipes ya fixtures install karne ke liye.

questions.question: Agar first aid box mein bandages khatam ho gaye hain, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use ignore karna

questions.explanation: First aid box ko hamesha fully stocked rakhna chahiye, taaki emergency mein koi kami na ho.

questions.question: Workplace par good housekeeping ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Tools ko sahi jagah par rakhna aur area ko clean rakhna
options.C: Sirf important tools ko saaf karna

questions.explanation: Good housekeeping ka matlab hai tools ko organized rakhna, debris ko hatana, aur ek clean aur safe working environment maintain karna.

questions.question: Jab hot water pipes par kaam kar rahe ho, toh kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Pipes ko garam hi rehne dena
options.B: Paani ki supply band karke pipes ko thanda hone dena

questions.explanation: Hot water pipes par kaam karne se pehle, paani ki supply band karke pipes ko thanda hone dena chahiye taaki burns se bacha jaa sake.

questions.question: Domestic plumbing mein sabse common plastic pipe kaun sa hai?

options.B: GI

questions.explanation: PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride) pipes domestic water supply aur drainage mein sabse zyada use hote hain, affordable aur corrosion resistant hone ke kaaran.

questions.question: Hot water supply ke liye kaun sa plastic pipe prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: CPVC

questions.explanation: CPVC (Chlorinated Polyvinyl Chloride) pipes high temperatures ko withstand kar sakte hain, isliye hot water supply ke liye suitable hain.

questions.question: Pipes ko direction change karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Tee

questions.explanation: Elbow fitting pipes ki direction ko change karne ke liye use hoti hai, generally 90 ya 45 degrees par.

questions.question: Do alag-alag diameter ke pipes ko join karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Reducer

questions.explanation: Reducer fitting ka use do alag-alag diameter ke pipes ko smoothly connect karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Paani ke flow ko control ya band karne ke liye kaun sa device use hota hai?

options.B: Valve

questions.explanation: Valves (jaise gate valve, ball valve) paani ke flow ko regulate ya completely shut off karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: GI pipes ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Galvanized Iron

questions.explanation: GI ka matlab 'Galvanized Iron' hai, jismein iron pipes ko zinc ki coating se protect kiya jaata hai corrosion se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: PVC pipes ko join karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Soldering

questions.explanation: PVC pipes ko solvent cement se join kiya jaata hai, jo pipes aur fittings ko chemically weld kar deta hai.

questions.question: PPR pipes ki joining method kya hai?

options.B: Solvent Cement

questions.explanation: PPR (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) pipes ko heat fusion welding se join kiya jaata hai, jisse leak-proof joints bante hain.

questions.question: Leak-proof connection banane ke liye threaded fittings par kya lagaya jaata hai?

options.B: Paint
options.C: Teflon Tape (PTFE Tape) ya Thread Sealant

questions.explanation: Teflon tape ya thread sealant (pipe dope) threaded connections ko seal karta hai aur leaks ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Ek pipe line ko permanently block karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Union

questions.explanation: Cap fitting ka use pipe line ke end ko permanently seal ya block karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Brass fittings ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Corrosion resistant hote hain aur durable hote hain
options.C: Sirf drainage ke liye use hote hain

questions.explanation: Brass fittings corrosion resistant aur durable hote hain, isliye high-quality installations mein use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek pipe line se branch connection nikalne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Tee

questions.explanation: Tee fitting ek main pipe line se 90 degree par ek branch connection banane ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar do pipes ko future mein disconnect karne ki zaroorat ho, toh kaun si fitting use karni chahiye?

options.B: Elbow

questions.explanation: Union fitting do pipes ko connect karti hai aur future mein easy disconnection aur reconnection allow karti hai, bina poori line ko disassemble kiye.

questions.question: Copper pipes ki joining method kya hai?

options.B: Threading

questions.explanation: Copper pipes ko generally soldering (soft solder) ya brazing (hard solder) se join kiya jaata hai, jisse strong aur leak-proof joints bante hain.

questions.question: Drainage systems mein kaun se pipes use hote hain jinmein smooth inner surface hota hai taaki flow acha ho?

options.B: Copper Pipes

questions.explanation: SWR (Soil, Waste, Rainwater) pipes specially drainage ke liye designed hote hain, inka smooth inner surface hota hai jo blockage ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Pressure relief valve ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Excess pressure ko release karke system ko damage se bachana

questions.explanation: Pressure relief valve system mein jab pressure ek safe limit se zyada ho jaata hai, toh excess pressure ko release kar deta hai, equipment ko damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Water hammer ko control karne ke liye kya use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Air Chambers ya Water Hammer Arrestors

questions.explanation: Water hammer (pipes mein achanak awaaz aur vibration) ko absorb karne ke liye air chambers ya water hammer arrestors install kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Domestic water supply system mein paani ka primary source kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Municipal water supply (nagar nigam) ya borewell

questions.explanation: Gharon mein paani ya toh municipal corporation se aata hai ya phir borewell se pump kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Overhead water tank ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Paani ko store karna aur gravity se pressure maintain karna

questions.explanation: Overhead tank paani store karta hai aur gravity ke through ghar ke taps mein paani ka pressure maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Low water pressure ka common reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Pipes mein blockage ya leak

questions.explanation: Low water pressure aksar pipes mein blockage, scale buildup ya hidden leaks ke kaaran hota hai.

questions.question: Water meter ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Paani ke consumption ko measure karna

questions.explanation: Water meter ghar mein use hone wale paani ki quantity ko record karta hai, jiske basis par bill generate hota hai.

questions.question: Agar kitchen sink ke tap se paani dheere aa raha hai, toh pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Aerator mein blockage

questions.explanation: Sink taps ke aerators mein minerals ya debris jam jaate hain, jo flow ko restrict karte hain. Ise saaf karne se pressure theek ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Foot valve kahan install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Pump ke suction line ke end par (paani ke source mein)

questions.explanation: Foot valve pump ke suction line ke end par install kiya jaata hai, taaki paani ko pump mein wapas flow hone se roke aur debris ko enter hone se prevent kare.

questions.question: Pressure pump ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Low pressure areas mein paani ka pressure badhana

questions.explanation: Pressure pump low water pressure ki problem ko solve karta hai, especially ground floor ya direct municipal supply mein.

questions.question: Water supply pipes mein air lock hone ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Pipes mein hawa ka jam jaana jo paani ke flow ko rokta hai
options.B: Pipes mein paani ka jam jaana

questions.explanation: Air lock tab hota hai jab pipes mein hawa ka pocket ban jaata hai, jo paani ko aage badhne se rokta hai aur flow ko disrupt karta hai.

questions.question: Gate valve ka use kya hai?

options.B: Paani ke flow ko poori tarah se on ya off karna

questions.explanation: Gate valve ko generally paani ke flow ko poori tarah se kholne ya band karne ke liye use kiya jaata hai, jaise main supply line mein.

questions.question: Non-return valve (check valve) ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Paani ko dono directions mein flow hone dena
options.B: Paani ko sirf ek direction mein flow hone dena

questions.explanation: Non-return valve paani ko sirf ek direction mein flow hone deta hai aur backflow ko prevent karta hai, jaise pump installations mein.

questions.question: Burst pipe repair karne se pehle sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.A: Leak ko tape se band karna
options.B: Main water supply band karna

questions.explanation: Koi bhi major plumbing repair karne se pehle, main water supply ko band karna zaroori hai taaki aur paani waste na ho aur kaam karna safe ho.

questions.question: Paani ki pipes ko insulation kyun karte hain?

options.A: Pipes ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Heat loss (hot water) ya heat gain (cold water) ko kam karne ke liye aur freezing se bachane ke liye
options.C: Pipes ko mazboot banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Insulation pipes mein temperature maintain karta hai, hot water ko garam aur cold water ko thanda rakhta hai, aur thand mein pipes ko freeze hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Water purifier ke liye kaun si line se connection liya jaata hai?

options.B: Cold water line

questions.explanation: Water purifiers generally cold water supply line se connect hote hain, kyuki peene ke liye thanda paani hi use hota hai.

questions.question: Geyser installation ke liye kaun se do connections zaroori hain?

options.A: Hot water out, cold water in
options.B: Cold water in, hot water out
options.D: Hot water in, hot water out

questions.explanation: Geyser ko cold water supply chahiye paani garam karne ke liye, aur garam paani hot water out line se bahar aata hai.

questions.question: Agar paani mein rust (zang) ke particles aa rahe hain, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Copper pipes mein blockage

questions.explanation: Rust particles aana GI (Galvanized Iron) pipes ke internal corrosion ka sign hai, jisse pipes andar se zang lagne lagte hain.

questions.question: Booster pump ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Existing water pressure ko increase karna

questions.explanation: Booster pump existing water pressure ko badhata hai, especially jab multiple outlets par ek saath paani ki zaroorat ho.

questions.question: Water softener ka kya use hai?

options.B: Paani se hardness (minerals like calcium, magnesium) ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Water softener hard water se minerals ko remove karta hai, jisse pipes aur appliances mein scale buildup kam hota hai aur unki life badhti hai.

questions.question: Drainage systems mein paani kaise flow karta hai?

options.B: Gravity se

questions.explanation: Drainage systems gravity par depend karte hain, jismein paani slope ke through neeche ki taraf flow karta hai.

questions.question: P-trap ka main function kya hai?

options.B: Sewer gases ko ghar mein aane se rokna

questions.explanation: P-trap mein thoda paani hamesha bhara rehta hai jo ek 'water seal' banata hai, aur sewer gases ko drain se ghar mein aane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Soil pipes kaun se waste ke liye hote hain?

options.B: Bathroom basin ka paani

questions.explanation: Soil pipes toilets se aane wale 'black water' (fecal matter) ko carry karte hain.

questions.question: Waste pipes kaun se waste ke liye hote hain?

options.B: Kitchen sink, basin, shower se aane wala 'grey water'

questions.explanation: Waste pipes 'grey water' carry karte hain, jo toilets ke alawa baki fixtures se aata hai.

questions.question: Drainage pipes mein blockage ka common reason kya hai?

options.A: Paani ka flow bahut tez hona
options.B: Grease, hair, food particles, ya foreign objects

questions.explanation: Grease, baal, khane ke tukde, aur anya kachra drainage pipes mein jam kar blockage create karte hain.

questions.question: Vent pipe ka kya importance hai drainage system mein?

options.A: Sewer gases ko ghar mein aane se rokna
options.B: Drainage system mein air pressure maintain karna aur traps ko siphon hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Vent pipe drainage system mein positive aur negative pressure ko balance karta hai, jisse traps ke water seal siphon nahi hote aur gases bahar nikal jaati hain.

questions.question: Floor trap kahan install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Bathroom ke floor par

questions.explanation: Floor trap bathroom ke floor par install kiya jaata hai, taaki floor ka paani drain ho sake aur sewer gases na aayen.

questions.question: Sewerage system mein 'manhole' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Sewer lines ko access karne aur maintenance ke liye

questions.explanation: Manholes underground sewer lines tak access provide karte hain, jisse inspection, cleaning aur repair work kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar toilet flush karne par gurgling sound aa rahi hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Paani ka pressure bahut high hai
options.B: Vent pipe mein blockage ya trap siphon ho raha hai
options.C: Toilet tank mein paani kam hai

questions.explanation: Gurgling sound vent pipe blockage ya trap siphon hone ka sign hai, jisse drain system mein air pressure disturb hota hai.

questions.question: Septic tank ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Household waste water ko collect aur partially treat karna

questions.explanation: Septic tank un areas mein use hota hai jahan municipal sewerage system nahi hota. Ye solid waste ko settle karta hai aur liquid waste ko drain field mein distribute karta hai.

questions.question: Drain cleaning ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Plunger ya Drain Snake (Auger)

questions.explanation: Plunger aur drain snake (auger) common tools hain jo drain blockages ko clear karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Backwater valve ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Fresh water supply ko control karna
options.B: Sewerage system se backflow ko ghar mein aane se rokna
options.C: Hot water supply ko regulate karna

questions.explanation: Backwater valve floods ya heavy rains ke dauran municipal sewer line se paani ke backflow ko ghar mein aane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Grease trap kahan install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Kitchen sink drainage line mein

questions.explanation: Grease trap kitchen sink drainage line mein install kiya jaata hai, taaki grease aur oil ko main drainage system mein jaane se pehle trap kar sake.

questions.question: SWR pipes ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Soil, Waste and Rainwater

questions.explanation: SWR ka matlab 'Soil, Waste and Rainwater' hai, jo drainage applications ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Inspection chamber (gulley trap) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Drainage system ko inspect aur clean karne ke liye access point provide karna

questions.explanation: Inspection chamber drainage lines mein ek access point hota hai jahan se blockage ko inspect aur clear kiya ja sakta hai, aur gases ko bhi trap karta hai.

questions.question: Agar drainage pipe mein root penetration ho jaaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Pipe ko replace karna ya specialized root cutting tools use karna

questions.explanation: Tree roots drainage pipes mein cracks ke through ghus jaati hain aur blockage create karti hain. Iske liye pipe repair ya replacement, ya mechanical root cutting ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Drainage system mein 'slope' kyun important hai?

options.A: Pipes ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Gravity flow se waste water ko efficiently carry karne ke liye
options.C: Paani ko garam rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper slope drainage system mein gravity flow ko ensure karta hai, taaki solid waste settle na ho aur paani smoothly drain ho sake.

questions.question: PVC pipes ko kaatne ke baad kaun sa process zaroori hai burrs hatane ke liye?

options.B: Reaming ya Deburring

questions.explanation: Reaming ya deburring pipes ke edges se burrs ko hatata hai, jisse smooth flow maintain hota hai aur joints theek se baithte hain.

questions.question: Threaded pipes (jaise GI pipes) ko join karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Heat fusion

questions.explanation: Threaded pipes ko leak-proof banane ke liye thread sealant (pipe dope) ya PTFE (Teflon) tape use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Toilet commode install karte samay sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Floor par cement lagana
options.C: Drainage connection aur water supply connection theek se karna

questions.explanation: Commode installation mein drainage aur water supply connections ka leak-proof aur proper alignment sabse critical hai.

questions.question: Leak detect karne ka sabse common tarika kya hai?

options.B: Visual inspection (geeli jagah, paani ke nishan) aur sunna

questions.explanation: Leaks ko aksar geeli jagah, paani ke nishan, ya paani tapakne ki awaaz se detect kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Faucet (tap) ke leakage ko theek karne ke liye kya replace karna pad sakta hai?

options.B: Washer ya O-ring

questions.explanation: Aksar tap ke leaks worn-out washers ya O-rings ke kaaran hote hain, jinhe replace karne se leak theek ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Water heater (geyser) ki long life ke liye kya maintenance zaroori hai?

options.B: Anodized rod aur sediments ko periodically check aur clean karna

questions.explanation: Water heater mein sediments jam jaate hain aur anodized rod corrosion se bachati hai. Inki regular checking aur cleaning se geyser ki efficiency aur life badhti hai.

questions.question: Jab ek naya pipe section install karte hain, toh connections ke baad kya test karna chahiye?

options.B: Pressure test ya Leak test

questions.explanation: Naye connections ke baad pressure test ya leak test karna zaroori hai, taaki future mein koi leakage na ho.

questions.question: Soldering karte samay kaun sa safety precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Ventilation ensure karna aur safety goggles pehenna

questions.explanation: Soldering fumes harmful ho sakte hain, isliye proper ventilation aur aankhon ki protection ke liye safety goggles zaroori hain.

questions.question: Angle valve kahan use hota hai?

options.B: Toilets, wash basins, aur geysers jaise individual fixtures ke water supply connection par

questions.explanation: Angle valve individual fixtures ki water supply ko control karta hai, jisse repair ya replacement ke dauran poori supply band karne ki zaroorat nahi padti.

questions.question: Agar wash basin drain slow ho raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: P-trap mein blockage ya Hair trap mein kachra

questions.explanation: Wash basin ke slow drain ka common reason P-trap ya hair trap mein baal aur sabun ka kachra jamna hota hai.

questions.question: Pipe threading ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Die stock set

questions.explanation: Die stock set metal pipes (jaise GI pipes) ke end par external threads banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Waterproofing ka kya importance hai bathroom installations mein?

options.B: Deewaron aur floors ko paani ke seepage se bachana

questions.explanation: Waterproofing bathroom mein paani ko deewaron aur floors mein seep hone se rokta hai, jisse structural damage aur dampness prevent hoti hai.

questions.question: Flush tank ke andar paani overfill hone ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Flush handle kharab hona

questions.explanation: Flush tank mein paani overfill hone ka main karan inlet valve ka theek se band na hona hota hai, jo float mechanism ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen sink ko install karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper alignment, secure mounting, aur leak-proof drainage/supply connections

questions.explanation: Sink ki proper alignment, stable mounting aur leak-free connections ensure karna zaroori hai taaki woh functionality aur durability provide kare.

questions.question: Pipes ko wall mein fix karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Pipe clamps ya saddles

questions.explanation: Pipe clamps ya saddles pipes ko support dete hain aur wall par securely fix karte hain, vibrations aur movement ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Agar bathroom mein tiles ke beech se paani leak ho raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Grout lines damaged hain ya waterproofing fail ho gayi hai
options.B: Paani ka pressure bahut high hai

questions.explanation: Tiles ke beech se paani ka leak hona damaged grout ya waterproofing membrane ke failure ka sign hai, jisse seepage hota hai.

questions.question: Plumbing codes ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Public health aur safety ensure karna, aur consistent standards maintain karna

questions.explanation: Plumbing codes minimum standards provide karte hain taaki installations safe, efficient aur hygienic hon.

questions.question: Ek plumber ko customer se kaise baat karni chahiye?

options.B: Politely, clearly aur professionally, problem explain karke

questions.explanation: Good customer service ke liye polite, clear aur professional communication zaroori hai, taaki customer ko problem aur solution samajh mein aaye.

questions.question: Water conservation ke liye ek plumber kya advise de sakta hai?

options.B: Low-flow fixtures install karna aur leaks ko turant repair karna

questions.explanation: Low-flow taps, showerheads, aur toilets install karne se paani ki bachat hoti hai, aur leaks ko theek karna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar customer ko low water pressure ki shikayat hai, toh pehla troubleshooting step kya hoga?

options.B: Main stopcock poora khula hai ya nahi check karna aur aerators saaf karna

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle main stopcock aur fixture aerators ko check karna chahiye, kyuki ye common reasons hain low pressure ke.

questions.question: Plumbing work ki estimation mein kya factors include hote hain?

options.B: Material cost, labor cost, aur transport/other expenses

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive estimation mein material, labor, aur anya expenses (jaise transport, tools, permit fees) shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Ek plumber ko apne kaam mein quality kaise maintain karni chahiye?

options.B: Best practices follow karna, quality materials use karna, aur kaam ko accurately karna

questions.explanation: Quality work ke liye correct techniques, reliable materials, aur detail par dhyaan dena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar customer ko drainage blockage ki problem hai, aur plunger kaam nahi kar raha, toh next step kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Drain snake (auger) ka use karna

questions.explanation: Plunger se na theek hone par, drain snake (auger) ek mechanical tool hai jo deep blockages ko clear kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Rainwater Harvesting (RWH) system ka primary goal kya hai?

options.A: Baarish ke paani ko waste karna
options.B: Baarish ke paani ko collect aur store karke use karna

questions.explanation: RWH system baarish ke paani ko collect karta hai, jise non-potable uses jaise gardening, toilet flushing, ya groundwater recharge ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Solar water heater ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Suraj ki energy se paani garam karta hai, electricity bill kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Solar water heater renewable energy (sunlight) ka use karta hai, jisse electricity consumption kam hoti hai aur long term mein cost effective hota hai.

questions.question: Automatic water level controller ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Overhead tank mein paani ke level ko automatically maintain karna

questions.explanation: Ye device tank mein paani ka level detect karta hai aur pump ko automatically on/off karta hai, jisse overflow ya dry running prevent hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar customer ko paani mein badboo ki shikayat hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Water source, storage tank ki safai, aur aerators

questions.explanation: Paani mein badboo ka karan source contamination, tank mein algae/bacteria growth, ya tap aerators mein buildup ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Plumbing work ke baad site ko kaise chhodna chahiye?

options.B: Clean aur tidy, saare tools aur kachra remove karke

questions.explanation: Professional plumber hamesha kaam khatam hone ke baad site ko clean aur organized chhodta hai, jo customer satisfaction ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar customer ek fixture ko relocate karna chahta hai, toh kya factors consider karne honge?

options.B: New location par water supply, drainage, aur structural feasibility

questions.explanation: Fixture relocate karne mein existing plumbing lines ko extend ya modify karna padta hai, aur structural support bhi check karna hota hai.

questions.question: Ek plumber ko emergency situation (jaise pipe burst) mein kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant main water supply band karna aur damage ko minimize karna

questions.explanation: Emergency mein sabse pehla step main water supply ko band karna hai taaki aur paani waste na ho aur damage control ho sake.

questions.question: Paani ki quality improve karne ke liye kya options hain?

options.B: Water filters, purifiers, ya softeners install karna

questions.explanation: Water filters impurities remove karte hain, purifiers bacteria/viruses ko marte hain, aur softeners hardness kam karte hain, jisse paani ki overall quality badhti hai.

questions.question: Plumbing business mein 'word-of-mouth' marketing ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Customers ki recommendations se naye clients milte hain, jo bahut effective hota hai
options.C: Sirf bade businesses ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Satisfied customers ki recommendations naye clients lane ka sabse powerful aur cost-effective tarika hai, jo trust build karta hai.
